<h1>NOTE FOR PEOPLE USING THIS AS A BASE </h1>
PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE REGENERATE THE KEYS! THIS IS FOR SECUIRTY PURPOSES!
You will also need to edit the public key in the client and resign signed scripts.
Then you can move the PrivatKeyBlob and PublicKeyBlob and PrivateKey.pem to somewhere not on the server or git repo!
That way no one can breach in with signed scripts!
